calendar.matters:
Pet. For Modification Of Irrevocable Tr. Upon Consent Of All Beneficiaries 1)Consent To Transfer Place Of Admin. 2)To Eliminate Requirement For Corp.
Off Calendar Aug-27-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Martha Daetwyler appearing for petitioner Henry Safrit. Counsel has filed a POS on trustee, Consent by trustee and an amendment with the address of the beneficiaries. Court is satisfied. Matter granted. Order signed.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: A. Guitron.
